headline: Own a piece of the grocery store that shows you where your food comes from
subhead: FarmThru connects regenerative farms across NSW directly to families. No middlemen. No mystery meat. Now opening to everyday investors on Birchal.
hero_copy:
Something changed in the way Australians buy food. More families started asking: who grew this? How was it raised? Why can't I just buy from the farm?

FarmThru was built to answer those questions. We are a farm-direct grocery store. You order online from named regenerative farms in NSW. Your food goes straight from their farm to our Brookvale hub. You collect it days later, not weeks.

sections.heading: A grocery store built around farms, not around margins
sections.body:
Every product on FarmThru traces back to a named farm. Rachel's Farm in Kempsey for 100% grass-fed beef. Bundarra Farm for pork. Collins Wild Caught for wild-caught Alaskan salmon. Paris Creek for biodynamic dairy. Farmer Brown for eggs.

No hormones. No antibiotics. No feedlot finishing. Zero wholesalers in between. The farmer earns a fairer price. Your family gets food that is genuinely fresh.

This is not a meal kit or a box you cannot customise. It is on-demand ordering. No lock-in. Buy what you want, when you want. Sydney families collect from the Brookvale hub.

sections.heading: Why we are opening this to investors
sections.body:
We believe the people who buy the food should have the chance to own a piece of the business that supplies it.

FarmThru is launching an equity crowdfunding campaign on Birchal in mid-2026. Minimum investment is $50. Maximum is $10,000 per investor. A $5 refundable VIP deposit gets you first access, priority updates, and an exclusive Q&A before the campaign opens to everyone.

This is early-stage investing. It carries real risk. You could lose some or all of your investment. We will not dress that up. But we will give you every number, every farm name, and every dollar in the disclosure document on Birchal. We can't promise returns — early-stage investing carries real risk.

sections.heading: Compliance
sections.body: This is a pre-registration page for an upcoming equity crowdfunding campaign. No money is being raised at this stage. Any future offer will be made via a disclosure document on Birchal. This is not financial advice. Consider seeking independent financial advice before making any investment decision.

creative_brief: Hero: wide-angle shot of green NSW farmland in early morning light. Below-fold: grid of named farm partner portraits alongside their products. Brookvale hub lifestyle shot. Earthy palette, clean typography. Single email capture form above the fold.
